text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I've come to a shrine with King Halo.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I haven't been feeling myself lately...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should say a little prayer—just enough
for some peace of mind.
choice_data_list: We've come all the way here, after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I believe I shall give the gods the
opportunity to make my wishes come true!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you say a prayer too? Just waiting
around would be a waste of time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I pray with King Halo.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Grant me a tremendous victory in the next race...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And may my road to glory continue to shine with
dazzling light!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and also, I want good health, no traffic
accidents, and lots of joy for the younger
students!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Standing beside her, I can hear King Hero voicing
her prayers with unusual seriousness.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I think that's everything. May all my
wishes be granted!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, a gentle breeze caresses my cheek.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, what a pleasant breeze. Hehe.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I feel a little better somehow. This god is a good
listener!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Whew... To have even the gods on my side feels
like my charm has bewitched the heavens.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That's a first-rate Umamusume for you! ♪
Ohohoho! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following that, King Halo's performance in
training improves.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Suddenly, a strong gust of wind blows through,
rustling the surrounding trees.

text_block_list.name: Crow
text_block_list.text: Caw! Caw!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-what was that?! I felt an ominous
presence!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what could have drawn these ill-fated omens
to me?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh wait, I get it... You're trying to get me to buy
a lucky charm, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
What greedy little gods you are... Fine, I'll play
along just this once.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I should buy one soon before they sell out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, King Halo clutches her new charm with
a worried expression on her face.
